message:
feat(fcp-host): add enforcement pipeline and health check API modules

Enforcement pipeline (enforcement.rs): 9-stage security check pipeline
that validates every request before routing to connectors — canonical
decode, zone membership, capability verify, checkpoint/revocation
freshness, taint approval, policy ceiling, connector manifest, and
rate limit checks. 162 tests.

Health check API (health.rs): Composite health status aggregation from
connectors, mesh, resources, and named subsystems with tri-state
model (Healthy/Degraded/Unhealthy), worst-case rollup, and
liveness/readiness probe support. 77 tests.

Total fcp-host lib: 1694 tests, all passing, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
